context.projectOverview: Obsidian vault storage layer. Sprint 1 (DONE) built src/vault/{types,frontmatter,note-io}.ts (VaultNote model + pure frontmatter parse/serialize + note-io). This sprint adds the DERIVED FactStore index: a pure noteToFacts mapping and a reindexNotes function that writes through the existing writeFact/reconcileFact reconcile-at-ingest path. FactStore is a rebuildable active-state index over canonical note frontmatter.

completedSprints.title: Vault note model + frontmatter round-trip I/O
completedSprints.summary: src/vault/types.ts (VaultNote {frontmatter,body,path}), frontmatter.ts (pure parse/serializeFrontmatter + parseNote/serializeNote), note-io.ts (readNote/writeNote/listNotes). 18 tests.

note: Consume src/state/facts.ts and src/orchestrator/memory/reconcile.ts AS-IS (do NOT modify them). Import FactStore + writeFact + FactInput from '../state/facts.js' (writeFact is re-exported there). Keep noteToFacts + reindexNotes clock-free (inject `now` ISO string). Tests use new FactStore(':memory:'). Stay on branch bober/medical-team. Use 'npx vitest run' (never bare vitest).
